description: As the Tour Manager for the band 'Neon Velvet', create a technical rider consisting of a Stage Plot and an Input List based on the requirements in ~/Desktop/neon_velvet_tech_spec.txt. The Stage Plot must visually represent the band's layout including drums, bass amp, vocal mics, monitor wedges, and power drops in their correct positions (Stage Right/Left, Upstage/Downstage). The Input List must be a table with columns for Channel Number, Instrument, and Microphone/Input Type. Include a Title Block with the band name and contact info. Save the diagram to ~/Diagrams/neon_velvet_rider.drawio and export the final result as a PDF to ~/Diagrams/neon_velvet_rider.pdf. Note: 'Stage Right' refers to the musician's right (facing the audience), which is the Audience's Left.

spatial_checks.description: Drums must be Upstage (visually above) Vocals
Keys (Stage Right) must be to the left of Guitar (Stage Left)
